title: Browser-E2E evidence manifest (P-C — OUTPUT, driver-written)
description: manifest.json written by the ORCHESTRATOR after a browser-E2E run: the committed, hash-anchored evidence record under .orchestrator/audit/browser/<loop_id>/<run_id>/. The driver computes per-artifact sha256 + artifact_manifest_hash and appends a matching browser_e2e_evidence event to the Audit Spine; reconcile + pre-acceptance recompute and verify both. checklist-results.json (an array of $defs/checklist_result) is a sibling artifact listed in artifacts[]. The executor produces OBSERVATIONS; this record never carries a milestone verdict.

clean_state_proof.description: Optional reference to the pre-run clean-state proof (fixture reset / empty store).

exit_code.description: Executor exit code. 0 = ran cleanly (captured criterion failures are still 0); non-zero is a RUNTIME failure → the driver gate_hard_fails before this manifest is trusted.

path.description: Normalized relative path strictly under the run dir.

artifact_manifest_hash.description: sha256(canonical_json(sorted [{name, sha256}])). Recomputed by the driver at reconcile + pre-acceptance; mismatch → gate_hard_fail.

provenance.description: A2 framework-owned execution binding for the managed external_test_runner class (this phase scopes the provenance gate to external_test_runner; the env-gated in-process playwright class is a tracked follow-up). Absent for the deterministic local_http dry-run class. The driver GENERATES the nonce and writes the in-flight marker + paired e2e_start/e2e_end Audit-Spine events BEFORE/AFTER the spawn; the pre-spawn provenance gate re-verifies nonce+run_id == run-provenance.json == events, that this window EQUALS the Audit-Spine event timestamps, the run-provenance wall-clock ⊆ that window, the exit/report agreement (concrete integer exit code), ≥1 concrete real-browser artifact (trace/screenshot/video), and the Audit-Spine chain — else gate_hard_fail before any verdict. An adopter-supplied nonce/marker can never satisfy the gate.

e2e_start_ts.description: ISO-8601 UTC; the driver's e2e_start audit event time (window lower bound).

e2e_end_ts.description: ISO-8601 UTC; the driver's e2e_end audit event time (window upper bound).

evidence_refs.description: Relative paths under the run dir (screenshots/console/network/...).

executor_status.description: OBSERVATION ONLY. Acceptance judges independently; the driver vetoes a milestone pass that contradicts a critical 'fail'/'error' (§3.2).

mapping_state.description: A2/§5.1 router disambiguation for the external_test_runner. 'mapped' — a runner test is bound to this signed criterion (executor_status is authoritative). 'unmapped' — NO test is bound (a runner-CONTRACT completeness fault): the driver refuses to publish an acceptance-eligible manifest with any unmapped signed criterion (pre-publication HALT), so 'unmapped' is never emitted as 'skipped' and never routes as a code-fix. Absent ⇒ 'mapped' (the declarative local_http/playwright executors drive the checklist directly).
